title: Top 5 Insurance Stocks to Gain From Fed's Likely Rate Hike
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap insurers that saw positive earnings estimate revisions within the last 30 days. These are: CINF, RJF, RE, WRB and ACGL.

title: Raymond James (RJF) Ratings Upgraded By Moody's, Outlook Stable
text: Raymond James' (RJF) senior unsecured debt and issuer ratings are upgraded to A3 from Baa1 by Moody's. The company's rating outlook remains stable upon review.

title: 5 Stocks With Upgraded Broker Ratings to Buy for Solid Gains
